The Problem

Decline of
Human Connection

In a world that's more "connected" than ever, real-world connections are disappearing. People long for genuine interaction but don't know how to find it, or worse, have lost the confidence to initiate it. This is the gap we're aiming to fill with CliQmates: real-world connections, when and where they matter most.

The Product

Easy as One... Two... CliQ... Mates!

Real people. Real time. Real place.

Meet Real People

A profile that reflects personality, spontaneity, and intention. One swipe. Zero pressure.

Your Vibe, Your Timing

Go Live and instantly see people nearby who share your interests. No feeds. No filters.

Real-Time Discovery

Send a wave. A quick message follows. Just enough to break the ice before going face-to-face.
